sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26708" key="dieuqudrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διευθυδρομέω</orth>, <sense id="n26708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">persevere with,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς πράξεις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.218.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
